5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

6021.issue: [W6021] `## License` is not the last section in [README.md](https://github.com/hacki11/ioBroker.bsblan/blob/master/README.md). The license section should be the last section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#352] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/hacki11/ioBroker.bsblan/issues/352)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/hacki11/ioBroker.bsblan/blob/master/package.json)

0050.issue: [W0050] 'request' package is deprecated and no longer maintained. Consider migrating to native 'node:fetch' or 'axios' if more complex functionality is needed.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/hacki11/ioBroker.bsblan/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
